title: Operator loop researcher product proof status v0
problem: Ticket-381 delivered prove-researcher-product and gitignored researcher_product_proof_latest.json, but operator_loop plan mode does not surface product proof readiness, artifact path, or recommended_action for operators.
acceptance_criteria: operator_loop --mode plan includes researcher_product_proof_status with artifact_path and product_verdict when artifact present.
Plan recommends run_researcher_product_proof when artifact missing and product-risk drift is active.
No public export or public-site changes.
non_goals: Autocycle auto-execution of full product proof on dirty trees.
rollback_plan: Revert operator_loop plan field and tests only.
